summary.summary: Commit CI: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION to 0.8.4.16 updates Config.xcconfig, changing APP_DEV_VERSION from 0.8.4.15 to 0.8.4.16. The diff shows only this line in Config.xcconfig was modified.
summary.userFacingImpact: This change updates a build/dev version identifier (APP_DEV_VERSION) in Config.xcconfig and does not modify application source logic in the provided diff, so user-facing behavior is unlikely to change.
